description: Healthcare data API platform providing unified access to patient medical records. Single API connects to major EHR systems and health data networks. Focus on developer experience and rapid integration for digital health applications.
business_model: B2B - API platform to digital health companies
target_market: Digital health startups, telemedicine platforms, care coordination apps
competitive_advantage: Developer-first approach, rapid deployment, comprehensive EHR coverage

varden_fit.rationale: Infrastructure play - competes with Redox/Leyr in healthcare API space
